title: Cosmetic
description: SaaS interface for our supplier to log in, with a provided code.
instructions:
the app will collect and guide them to register all used raw materials and verify those are legally compliant. based on the CAS number and valid documentation.

After that, their can use the validated raw materials to generate the relevant product formulations.

Once verified and validated by a AI bot and our QA Manager, the entire set can be submitted as package.

file_structure.gitignore:
# Python environments & cache
venv/**
**/__pycache__/**

# Node.js dependencies
**/node_modules/**
**/.npm/**

# Version control metadata
**/.git/**
